title: Electroweak doublet dark matter for the galactic halo gamma-ray excess
bridge_note: Halo γ-ray excess is fit by a minimal DM model, but m_DM and coupling parameters remain degenerate. Constraint stacking reduces parameter space without selecting a unique branch.
cosine_bridge: Fit ≠ identifiability. Constraints narrow but do not resolve; identifiability emerges only when independent (orthogonal) constraints with sufficient precision collapse remaining branches (45° 📐 signal > noise).
engagement_detail: Mapped paper’s residual degeneracy to 01–04 demos: constraints ≠ uniqueness; stable ≠ correct; precision threshold; orthogonality threshold.
notes_internal: Use repo as canonical bridge. 04 (orthogonality) is the key conceptual link: independent observables required for identifiability.
